live_mode.description: This field will be true if this object exists in the live environment or false if it exists in the test environment.

name.description: The name of the virtual account.

description.description: An optional free-form description for internal use.

counterparty_id.description: The ID of a counterparty that the virtual account belongs to. Optional.

internal_account_id.description: The ID of the internal account that the virtual account is in.

account_details.description: An array of account detail objects.

routing_details.description: An array of routing detail objects. These will be the routing details of the internal account.

debit_ledger_account_id.description: The ID of a debit normal ledger account. When money enters the virtual account, this ledger account will be debited. Must be accompanied by a credit_ledger_account_id if present.

credit_ledger_account_id.description: The ID of a credit normal ledger account. When money enters the virtual account, this ledger account will be credited. Must be accompanied by a debit_ledger_account_id if present.

ledger_account_id.description: If the virtual account links to a ledger account in Modern Treasury, the id of the ledger account will be populated here.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.
